## CreateAddressInput variable

Zod schema for creating a new address. Accepts untrimmed strings and pipes them through validation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
CreateAddressInput: z.ZodObject<
	{
		line1: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodString>
		line2: z.ZodNullable<z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodString>>>
		city: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'City'>>
		unit: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodString>
		postalCode: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'PostalCode'>>
		country: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodString>
	},
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		line1: string
		city: string & z.BRAND<'City'>
		unit: string
		postalCode: string & z.BRAND<'PostalCode'>
		country: string
		line2?: string | null | undefined
	},
	{
		line1: string
		city: string
		unit: string
		postalCode: string
		country: string
		line2?: string | null | undefined
	}
>
```
